sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 10.25 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.10)

statement.latex: (Well-known problem). Does there exist an algorithm which decides for a given automorphism of a free group whether this automorphism has a non-trivial fixed point? { G.\,S.\,Makanin} Yes, it does (O.\,Bogopolski, O.\,Maslakova, Int. J. Algebra Comput., { 26}, no.\,1 (2016), 29--67).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory IV_PROBLEM_UNDEFINED; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
